description: Letter from Akhlābū Kohen b. Aharon, in Alexandria, to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. Around 1045. In the handwriting of Ibrāhīm b. Faraḥ. Regarding one dinar and a quarter that Abu Zikrī needs to get from Abū Yūsuf Yaʿqūb, after he sent it to him by Abu Naṣr, who passed away meanwhile. Mentions many people and sends his greetings to them. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #764) VMR
description_he: מכתב מאחלאבו כהן בן אהרן, אלכסנדריה, לנהריי בן נסים, פוסטאט, בערך 1045. בעניין דינר ורבע שצריך אבו זכרי לקבל.
